SEARCH
Module ProjetGenieLogicel3
Package model

Class PriorityAgent

java.lang.Object
model.Agent
model.PriorityAgent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PriorityAgent extends Agent implements Serializable
High-priority agent whose movement speed scales with its priority level.

Speed formula: 1.0 + priorityLevel * 0.5. Examples: level 1 → 1.5, level 2 → 2.0, level 4 → 3.0.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • PriorityAgent

      public PriorityAgent(int id, Node currentPosition, Node destination, int priorityLevel)
      Creates a priority agent with the given priority level.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier
      currentPosition - starting node
      destination - target node
      priorityLevel - priority level (>= 1; higher means faster)
